evidence_snippet: Emory was among the notable casualties during the Battle by the Lakeshore in 130 AC, where the westermen host was defeated by the riverlords.
Emory joined Lord Jason Lannister's host during the Dance of the Dragons, in support of King Aegon II Targaryen and the greens.
